prompt: I need to build a two-column layout: on mobile it should stack vertically, on tablet and above it should be side by side with equal columns and a gap between them. Each column has a card inside. How do I build this with hearth-react?

assertions.text: Uses Flex or Grid layout component (not raw div)
Gap specified on parent container (not margin on children)
Includes mobile breakpoint in responsive direction/columns
Uses space tokens for gap (string values like '200', not numeric values like 2)
Layout stacks on mobile and sits side-by-side on tablet+
